mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_data ( device_id, report_time, temperature, voltage, current_value, power, soc ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{reportTime}, #{temperature}, #{voltage}, #{currentValue}, #{power}, #{soc} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, device_id, report_time, temperature, voltage, current_value, power, soc, created_at FROM device_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND report_time >= #{startTime} AND report_time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY report_time ASC
